case_title: KOZAK,JAY VS SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY- STEVE BARBAGELATTA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY KOZAK,JAY AS TO DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY-  STEVE BARBAGELATTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO STEVE BARBAGELATTA AND RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOZAK,JAY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY-  STEVE BARBAGELATTA SETTLED. $500.00 BY AUG 5, 1994, CHECK FROM CARL WARREN & CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGM. DEBTOR'S SAT. OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFEND.
JUDGM. DEBTOR'S SAT. OF JUDGMENT SIGNED BY JUDGE BENSON.
